summary: The diff implements REQ-1 fully by wiring the search engine ID 'a566dfe30b89f4713' as the cx parameter in backend/main.mo. REQ-2 is largely implemented via useQueries.ts (search mutation, result parsing, error handling) and referenced components, though the proxy navigation acceptance criterion cannot be satisfied as the proxy is stubbed to always throw.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking a search result navigates the active tab to the result URL via the proxy.
missing_requirements.reason: The useProxyRequest hook is stubbed to always throw an error ('Direct URL proxy is not available'), meaning clicking a search result cannot navigate via the proxy as required by the acceptance criteria.
